QF.id: III-C Prevention of Money Laundering Act_1

question.text: The provisions of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 (PMLA) came into force on:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 9.1, the provisions of PMLA came into force on July 1, 2005. **The Trap:** The Act was passed in 2002 but its provisions came into force only in 2005, and candidates may confuse the two dates. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The three-year gap between passing and enforcement allowed for the creation of the necessary institutional framework including FIU-IND.
